projects.name: FraudShield — Real-Time Fraud Detection
projects.description: Ensemble model (XGBoost + Isolation Forest) reaching 98.2% accuracy and 0.99 AUC-ROC at 8% FPR. Real-time scoring at 5,000+ TPS with sub-100ms latency, driving an estimated $1.92M in annual savings via 80% fraud reduction.

projects.name: Multi-Modal E-Commerce Recommendation Engine
projects.description: Hybrid deep-learning system fusing collaborative filtering, content-based filtering, and a graph convolutional network. Processed 200K+ transactions; achieved 95% relevance, F1 0.93, and 0.96 AUC.

projects.name: IBM HR Analytics — Employee Attrition Prediction
projects.description: Multi-model benchmark (XGBoost, LightGBM, SVM) reaching 86.6% accuracy / 0.92 AUC. SHAP explainability surfaced the top attrition drivers; delivered alongside a Power BI dashboard for non-technical stakeholders.

projects.name: Medical Insurance Cost Prediction
projects.description: Benchmarked five regression algorithms with full EDA. Best model: Random Forest at R² 0.86 / RMSE 4,842. Smokers with high BMI carry roughly 3x higher cost — validated via chi-square and ANOVA.

projects.name: COVID-19 Data Engineering
projects.description: End-to-end data engineering project on COVID-19 epidemiological data — ingestion, transformation, and analytics-ready modeling using Python and T-SQL.

projects.name: Customer Churn Prediction
projects.description: Production-style churn model exploring class-imbalance handling, feature importance, and threshold tuning for retention-focused decisioning.
